'''Jyykle vultures''' were solitary flightless avian creatures that lived on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. Their feathers were normally ruffled and their hide was very leathery. They were not aggressive at all and normally ran away when provoked. Some more vicious ones were sometimes found in groups of five and assaulted random people but this was very rare.

{{Creature-stub}}
